caption: The video features an older man with a bald head and a white beard, wearing a gray polo shirt. He appears to be speaking or presenting, as he is looking directly at the camera with a serious expression. The background includes a white wall with various signs and logos, including one that reads "ZB38 Alpha." There is also a partially visible yellow sign on the left side of the frame. The setting seems to be a professional environment, possibly a conference or exhibition, given the presence of informational posters and the formal attire of the man. Another person briefly enters the frame from the left side, suggesting that there might be other attendees or participants in the vicinity.
